title: viola hederacea var. genuina
intro: Viola hederacea var. genuina, also known as wild pansy or field pansy, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the viola family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Viola hederacea var. genuina include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and act as an expectorant to relieve respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Viola hederacea var. genuina include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
